mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM location WHERE code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO location (id, code, name, address_line, location_type, version) VALUES (#{row.id}, #{row.code}, #{row.name}, #{row.addressLine}, #{row.locationType}, #{row.version})
mapper.update: UPDATE location SET code = #{row.code}, name = #{row.name}, address_line = #{row.addressLine}, location_type = #{row.locationType}, version = #{row.version}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{row.id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM location WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{expectedVersion}
